name: JazzHRConnector
description: Connects to the JazzHR (Resumator) ATS REST API to read and create jobs, applicants, notes, activities, ratings, contacts, tasks, and workflow data. Paginated reads + form-encoded mutations. API key is sent as the ?apikey= query parameter on every request.

install_fields.label: JazzHR API Key
install_fields.help: From JazzHR → Settings → Integrations → API. The key is sent as the ?apikey= query parameter on every request (NOT in an Authorization header).

install_fields.label: JazzHR API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the JazzHR (Resumator) REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum JazzHR API requests per minute. Default is 60 — the client retries on 429 with jittered exponential backoff.

install_fields.label: Default User ID for Notes
install_fields.help: Default JazzHR user UUID used as the author of add_note() when the caller omits user_id.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the api_key by calling GET /jobs?page=1 and marks the connector as installed.

apis.name: Authorize (API Key)
apis.description: Stores the api_key as the credential. JazzHR uses single-key auth — no OAuth code exchange.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies JazzHR API connectivity by fetching GET /jobs?page=1.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Lists JazzHR users (recruiters, hiring managers). Paginated.

apis.name: Get User
apis.description: Fetches a single JazzHR user by ID.

apis.name: List Jobs
apis.description: Lists jobs filtered by status / title / type / city / dept / board_code. Paginated.

apis.name: Get Job
apis.description: Fetches a single job posting by ID.

apis.name: Create Job
apis.description: Creates a new job posting. Requires title, hiring_lead_id, and type. POST body is form-encoded.

apis.name: List Applicants
apis.description: Lists applicants filtered by status / name / city / state / apply-date window. Paginated.

apis.name: Get Applicant
apis.description: Fetches a single applicant by ID.

apis.name: Create Applicant
apis.description: Creates a new applicant record. POST body is form-encoded.

apis.name: Assign Applicant to Job
apis.description: Attaches an applicant to a job posting via POST /applicants2jobs (form-encoded).

apis.name: List Applicants by Job
apis.description: Lists all applicants attached to a specific job posting.

apis.name: List Notes
apis.description: Lists notes on a given applicant.

apis.name: Add Note
apis.description: Adds a note to an applicant. POST body is form-encoded. user_id falls back to config['default_user_id'] when omitted.

apis.name: List Activities
apis.description: Lists JazzHR activity events. Pass applicant_id to scope the feed to a single applicant.

apis.name: List Rating Steps
apis.description: Lists the hiring-team rating steps configured for the JazzHR account via GET /ratings.

apis.name: List Categories
apis.description: Lists JazzHR workflow categories (high-level buckets like Sales, Engineering) via GET /categories.

apis.name: List Workflows
apis.description: Alias of list_categories — JazzHR's categories ARE its workflow buckets.

apis.name: List Workflow Steps
apis.description: Lists workflow steps (stages within a workflow) via GET /workflows.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: Lists external JazzHR contacts (referrers, vendors).

apis.name: List Tasks
apis.description: Lists recruiter to-do items via GET /tasks.
